Name: Flies
Effect: If a being left the world this turn, you may play this for free.

Name: Enki
Effect: While on top: Your humans here are immortal (they cannot be banished or returned to the hand).

Name: Apsu
Effect: On enter: Return all your beings at the other locations to your hand.

Name: Enlil, Storm God
Effect: On enter: If there is a human here, return all other beings at this location to their controller's hand.

Name: Slave
Effect: While on top: You may banish this to play your next artefact this turn for [1] less.

Name: Shepherd
Effect: On enter: The next human you play costs [1] less.

Name: Farmer
Effect: On enter: Play another 1 cost human for free.

Name: Fisherman
Effect: On enter: Draw two humans from your underworld.

Name: Shipbuilder
Effect: While on top: Artifacts you play cost [1] less.

Name: Mami
Effect: While on top: Your first human each turn costs [1] less.

Name: Famine
Effect: On enter: Each player must banish one of their humans if possible.

Name: Plague Demon
Effect: On enter: Each player must banish one of their humans here if possible.

Name: The Ark
Effect: Costs [1] less for each of your humans. While on top: Non-Deity beings here are protected from the flood.

Name: Anu, Sky God
Effect: While on top: Your banished humans are returned to your hand instead.

Name: The Great Sumerian Flood
Effect: Put this aside at the start of the game. The flood happens when you have 12 or more humans. The Flood: Destroy all humans.

Name: Play to give to opponent. They can decide when to flood
Occurs when three plague cards have been drawn
At the start, secretly pick a number, occurs at that round
Bot players have half of the flood card in their deck, triggers when both are drawn
The flood cards sits beside the board, either player can trigger it on their turn by paying a cost
